infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow NoteSync to read photos from your library so you can attach them to your notes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow NoteSync to use the camera so you can take a photo and attach it to a note.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NoteSync to access your microphone so you can record voice memos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NoteSync to read photos from your library so you can attach them to your notes.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NoteSync to use the camera so you can take a photo and attach it to a note.
